recommendations.title: 009 Re:Cyborg
recommendations.overview: 009 Re:Cyborg follows a group of nine cyborgs, each of them created by a shadowy organization for use as weapons against humanity. The group turns on their creators to protect the population instead, using the powers given them to fight their creator

recommendations.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
recommendations.overview: A sudden attack by Wulf, a clever and traitorous lord of Rohan seeking vengeance for the death of his father, forces Helm Hammerhand, the King of Rohan, and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg.

recommendations.title: Napping Princess
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Adventure, Animation, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Japan, 2020, a few days before the opening of the Tokyo Olympics. Although she should be studying for her final exams, Kokone, a schoolgirl who lives in a small town with her widowed father, a mysterious and talented mechanic, falls asleep often, any

recommendations.title: Space Sweepers
recommendations.overview: When the crew of a space junk collector ship called The Victory discovers a humanoid robot named Dorothy that's known to be a weapon of mass destruction, they get involved in a risky business deal which puts their lives at stake.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
recommendations.overview: The Red Ribbon Army, an evil organization that was once destroyed by Goku in the past, has been reformed by a group of people who have created new and mightier Androids, Gamma 1 and Gamma 2, and seek vengeance against Goku and his family.

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: Tokyo Godfathers
recommendations.overview: On Christmas Eve, three homeless people living on the streets of Tokyo discover a newborn baby among the trash and set out to find its parents.

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.
